d.SHOW_CREATE:
CREATE TABLE `gaj6_ps_pets` (
  `id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `user_id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL,
  `pet_name` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `species` varchar(16) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'other',
  `species_detail` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `life_stage` varchar(16) DEFAULT NULL,
  `dog_size` varchar(16) DEFAULT NULL,
  `is_sterilised` varchar(16) DEFAULT NULL,
  `feeding_type` varchar(16) DEFAULT NULL,
  `primary_need` varchar(16) DEFAULT NULL,
  `current_food_brand` varchar(120) DEFAULT NULL,
  `current_food_free_text` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL,
  `primary_product_id` bigint(20) unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `primary_product_sku` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  `primary_product_name` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `primary_product_package` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  `photo_file_id` bigint(20) unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `is_primary` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `status` varchar(16) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  `client_ref` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `deleted_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_user` (`user_id`),
  KEY `idx_user_primary` (`user_id`,`is_primary`),
  KEY `idx_user_status` (`user_id`,`status`)
) ENGINE=MyISAM AUTO_INCREMENT=46 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci
d.BACKUP_SQL: CREATE TABLE gaj6__bak_s212c_pets_weight_20260718_01b43648 AS SELECT * FROM gaj6_ps_pets;
